steps.title: Interpret the input value
steps.content: $f(0)$ is the output of the function when $x=0$. On the graph, that is the $y$-value where the curve meets the $y$-axis.

steps.title: Read the graph at the axis
steps.content: At $x=0$, the curve is at the point $(0,3)$. So the corresponding function value is $3$.

steps.title: State the function value
steps.content: The value of $f(0)$ is $3$. The answer is 3.
